name: Doxycycline
description: I-Broad-spectrum ye-tetracycline antibiotics. Enye indlela yokuthintela inxeba lomlomo kwi-penicillin-aleji yezigulana. Ikwasebenza ngokuchasene nezinto eziphilayo ezingaqhelekanga kunye nezifo ezithwalwa zizilwanyana (i-malaria prophylaxis kwiindawo ezihlala zikho).
dose: 100 mg PO rhoqo 12 iiyure x 7 iintsuku.
window: Qalisa kwiiyure ze-3 zokulimala kwi-nxeba prophylaxis.
contraindications: Ukukhulelwa (kubangela ukubola kwezinyo lomntwana kunye nokuthintela ukukhula kwamathambo)
warnings: I-Photosensitivity - cebisa isigulana ukuba siphephe ukukhanya kwelanga.
Musa ukuthatha ukutya okutyebileyo nge-calcium, ii-antacids, okanye i-iron-- iyonakalisa ukufunxa.

pediatric.dose: Contraindicated phantsi kweminyaka 8. Ubudala be-8 +: 2-4 mg / kg / usuku lwahlulwe q12h (max 100 mg / dose).

obstetric.note: I-CONTRAINDICATED ekukhulelweni -- kubangela ingozi kumntwana. Sebenzisa i-amoxicillin endaweni yoko.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
